title: Delphis
body:
## Delphis is a modern, optimized vanilla friendly pack for servers.

### Features:

 - AppleSkin's food HUD improvements
 - Authenticate your account session without restarting the game (AuthMe)
	 - Supports Microsoft accounts as well as Mojang accounts!
 - No Microsoft telemetry
 - Microsoft chat reporting disabled by default as of version 2022.6.23+
 - Built-In connected glass and textures (Continuity)
 - Support for Optifine format connected texture packs
 - Shader support powered by Iris
	 - Compatible with Optifine shaders (but not all of them yet)
 - Massive FPS and performance improvements
	 - Sodium powered graphics
	 - Reduced RAM usage (FerriteCore)
	 - Indium compatibility built-in
	 - Smooth CPU usage on startup (Smooth Boot)
	 - Revamped lighting engine (Phosphor)
	 - And more!
 - Realms support (As of October 2022)
 - Resource packs to tweak or improve basic areas of the game (VanillaTweaks)
         - Vanilla Tweaks: https://vanillatweaks.net/
	 - Improved redstone
	 - Quieter annoying sound effects
	 - Texture error and z-fighting fixes
	 - QOL tweaks
Other packs have server host advertisements in the game. We don't.
